creator: mat@FreeBSD.org
text:
Note that the only thing that is left over in the doc directory after the upgrade is:

find /usr/local/share/doc/ghc-7.10.2/ -exec ls -ldFG {} +
drwxr-xr-x  3 root  wheel   3  1 mars   2016 /usr/local/share/doc/ghc-7.10.2//
drwxr-xr-x  3 root  wheel   3  9 août  18:11 /usr/local/share/doc/ghc-7.10.2/html/
drwxr-xr-x  2 root  wheel   3  9 août  18:12 /usr/local/share/doc/ghc-7.10.2/html/libraries/
lrwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel  59 22 mars   2016 /usr/local/share/doc/ghc-7.10.2/html/libraries/ShellCheck-0.3.8@ -> /usr/local/share/doc/cabal/ghc-7.10.2/ShellCheck-0.3.8/html

But in the lib, there are more stuff:

# find /usr/local/lib/ghc-7.10.2/
/usr/local/lib/ghc-7.10.2/
/usr/local/lib/ghc-7.10.2/package.conf.d
/usr/local/lib/ghc-7.10.2/package.conf.d/primitive-0.6-f39f6bcba2f66e648d35c2c6a451ec07.conf
/usr/local/lib/ghc-7.10.2/package.conf.d/tf-random-0.5-366f4a3dfedd28720605ca0686c6b120.conf
/usr/local/lib/ghc-7.10.2/package.conf.d/text-1.2.1.3-08fde3597b67542f0e8ffc03df431f0e.conf
/usr/local/lib/ghc-7.10.2/package.conf.d/regex-tdfa-1.2.0-cefc812f4c1e6ac9776ec37eafaacc74.conf
/usr/local/lib/ghc-7.10.2/package.conf.d/json-0.9.1-c4445cdd4efa5ac531eee5196369d63c.conf
/usr/local/lib/ghc-7.10.2/package.conf.d/syb-0.5.1-09089498a055bd723b4a95c1351d3c8a.conf
/usr/local/lib/ghc-7.10.2/package.conf.d/random-1.1-98345b6bcf313d3b0d27f839cbdf39c0.conf
/usr/local/lib/ghc-7.10.2/package.conf.d/QuickCheck-2.8.1-c22441fb3c2c2a8b76a40dad90da7d51.conf
/usr/local/lib/ghc-7.10.2/package.conf.d/parsec-3.1.9-765d70b7e21c67152b75b0c000794fc3.conf
/usr/local/lib/ghc-7.10.2/package.conf.d/ShellCheck-0.4.5-69c3bb164f08f5e6083e49fe32f0cfd2.conf
/usr/local/lib/ghc-7.10.2/package.conf.d/mtl-2.2.1-5cf332b11edb88a6040af20fd6a58acb.conf
/usr/local/lib/ghc-7.10.2/package.conf.d/ShellCheck-0.3.8-0ac03efdd626d4e5b4d4f9de943647d9.conf
/usr/local/lib/ghc-7.10.2/package.conf.d/regex-base-0.93.2-a81a16eaa725c84158e450fed67e7625.conf
/usr/local/lib/ghc-7.10.2/package.conf.d/extensible-exceptions-0.1.1.4-dae34b7345f33259ae772f45ee3cac62.conf

As in, I think, the packages registration.
